posts.author: simone.steffen (Simone Steffen)
posts.cookedHtml: Are there any automation recipes whose triggers are someone being added to a board? An example: when someone is added to a board, populate the Email column with their email, and add them in the People column. I tried a few different searches on this subject but came up empty. Thanks!
